tagline: Authentic Mexican Soul in the Heart of Denver
headline: Family Recipes. Festive Flavors. Authentic Soul.
subheadline: From Esperanza's Oaxacan kitchen to your table in Denver — experience 15 years of family tradition, street-style tacos, and handmade heart.

features.title: Authentic Tacos
features.description: Street-style tacos with handmade tortillas and family recipes passed down generations.

features.title: Burritos & Enchiladas
features.description: Hearty, flavor-packed classics made fresh every day.

features.title: Fresh Guacamole
features.description: Made tableside with ripe avocados, lime, cilantro, and a secret touch.

features.title: Family Friendly
features.description: A warm, festive space welcoming families, date nights, and everyone in between.

features.title: Festive Atmosphere
features.description: Colorful decor, live music on weekends, and the energy of a true Mexican celebration.

features.title: Margaritas & More
features.description: Hand-crafted margaritas, agua frescas, and a full bar menu.

about: Casa Bonita Tacos has been a Denver institution since Maria and Roberto Gutierrez opened our doors in 2009. What started as a small family dream has grown into a beloved neighborhood restaurant, but our recipes — handed down from Roberto's grandmother in Oaxaca — have never changed. We cook everything fresh, every day.

servicesPage.intro: Our menu celebrates the rich flavors of authentic Mexican cuisine.

items.title: Street Tacos (3-pack)
items.description: Al pastor, carne asada, or chicken with onion, cilantro, and salsa verde.

items.title: Signature Burrito
items.description: Stuffed with rice, beans, your choice of meat, cheese, and house salsa.

items.title: Cheese Enchiladas
items.description: Corn tortillas, house cheese blend, topped with red or green chile.

items.title: Tableside Guacamole
items.description: Fresh avocados prepared at your table with chips.

items.title: Classic Margarita
items.description: Fresh lime juice, triple sec, and your choice of tequila, on the rocks or frozen.

items.title: Family Combo Platter
items.description: Tacos, enchiladas, rice, beans — feeds the whole family.

aboutPage.story: In 2009, Maria and Roberto Gutierrez bet everything on a dream — an authentic Mexican restaurant in Denver's Baker neighborhood. Roberto's grandmother Esperanza had spent 40 years perfecting the recipes in Oaxaca, and Roberto spent 5 years as a chef in Mexico City before bringing those flavors to Colorado. Today, their children work alongside them, and Esperanza's recipes are still the heart of every dish.
aboutPage.mission: To bring the soul of authentic Mexican home cooking to Denver — one taco at a time — and to make every guest feel like family.
